mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member( memberno, mname, id, passwd, passwd2, nickname, profile, birthdate, gender, zipcode, address1, address2, tel, guardian_name, guardian_relationship, guardian_email, guardian_phone, guardian2_name, guardian2_relationship, guardian2_email, guardian2_phone, point, provider ) VALUES ( member_seq.nextval, #{mname}, #{id}, #{passwd}, #{passwd2}, #{nickname}, #{profile}, #{birthdate}, #{gender}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{tel}, #{guardian_name}, #{guardian_relationship}, #{guardian_email}, #{guardian_phone}, #{guardian2_name}, #{guardian2_relationship}, #{guardian2_email}, #{guardian2_phone}, #{point}, #{provider} )
mapper.select: SELECT memberno, mname, id, passwd, passwd2, nickname, profile, birthdate, gender, zipcode, address1, address2, tel, guardian_name, guardian_relationship, guardian_email, guardian_phone, guardian2_name, guardian2_relationship, guardian2_email, guardian2_phone, login_time, logout_time, point, provider FROM member WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET mname = #{mname}, id = #{id}, passwd = #{passwd}, passwd2 = #{passwd2}, nickname = #{nickname}, profile = #{profile}, birthdate = #{birthdate}, gender = #{gender}, zipcode = #{zipcode}, address1 = #{address1}, address2 = #{address2}, tel = #{tel}, guardian_name = #{guardian_name}, guardian_relationship = #{guardian_relationship}, guardian_email = #{guardian_email}, guardian_phone = #{guardian_phone}, guardian2_name = #{guardian2_name}, guardian2_relationship = #{guardian2_relationship}, guardian2_email = #{guardian2_email}, guardian2_phone = #{guardian2_phone}, point = #{point}, provider = #{provider} WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE id = #{id} AND passwd = #{passwd}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT memberno, id, mname, passwd, passwd2, nickname, profile, birthdate, gender, zipcode, address1, address2, tel, guardian_name, guardian_relationship, guardian_email, guardian_phone, guardian2_name, guardian2_relationship, guardian2_email, guardian2_phone, login_time, logout_time, point, provider FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT memberno, id, mname, tel, address1, mdate, grade FROM member ORDER BY memberno DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
